philosophy.description: Authorship, compilation, and tradition boundaries for philosophical texts.

psychology.description: Concept provenance: who coined a term, clinical vs pop-psych misuse, replication status.

history.description: Dated events, primary vs secondary sources, anachronism and mythologized past.

religion.description: Scripture attribution, sect boundaries, theological vs historical claims.

science.description: Discovery provenance (co-discovery, priority disputes, credit erasure), persistent science myths, and the citation-provenance of retracted/non-replicated claims.
